title: atriplex latifolia subsp. prostrata
intro: Atriplex latifolia subsp. prostrata, also known as spreading saltbush or creeping saltbush, is a low-growing, sprawling shrub native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and soothing digestive issues. Atriplex latifolia subsp. prostrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in salves and ointments for topical application.
